title: Windows Data Recovery Expert
desc:
I have a Windows-based PC whose internal hard drive holds files that are critical to me, and they are suddenly inaccessible. The job is straightforward: safely recover that lost data and hand it back intact.

Here’s what you need to know:

• Scope: It is a single computer hard drive, running Windows.  
• Objective: Retrieve the missing files—documents, photos, and project folders—without damaging the drive or altering existing file structures.  
• Tools & Approach: Whether you prefer R-Studio, EaseUS, Recuva, forensic-imaging utilities, or your own proven toolkit, I’m open, so long as the process is non-destructive and preserves file integrity.  

Deliverables  
1. Recovered data returned in the original folder structure (or as close as possible) on a separate medium or secure cloud link.  
2. A brief summary outlining the steps you took, the software used, and any remaining bad sectors or irrecoverable items so I understand the drive’s health going forward.  

Please confirm your experience with Windows data recovery and provide an estimated turnaround time.

title: Labour Compliance & Attendance Management
desc: This project focuses on comprehensive workforce administration to support the smooth operations of a company with approximately 50–60 employees. The scope of work encompasses managing daily attendance records, tracking overtime, leave, and shift rotations, as well as verifying and filing supplier documents for processing by the accounting team. Additionally, the project covers the administration of social security (BPJS/EPF/ESI) memberships and contributions, including new employee registration, data compilation, payment record filing, and periodic report reconciliation. All documents are organized using a structured digital filing system to facilitate data retrieval, support audit processes, and ensure information consistency across departments and contractors. The project’s primary objectives are to enhance administrative accuracy, ensure timely task completion, and strengthen coordination among HR, accounting teams, and external parties through organized, standardized, and clear documentation.

title: French Lecture Transcription QA(France)
desc:
I need a native-level French speaker to help me turn recorded corporate-training lectures into polished, time-stamped text. Your day-to-day work will revolve around listening to each session, transcribing every word in standard French, identifying speakers, adding accurate timestamps, and then running a second pass for metadata tagging and quality checks. Because these recordings come from corporate training programs, the language stays within general business terms—no heavy industry jargon—yet I still expect perfect spelling, punctuation, and consistency.

I can offer 15 or more hours each week, all handled remotely within France, and I pay an hourly rate that falls between roughly $10 and $20 depending on demonstrated accuracy and speed. Previous transcription or annotation experience is important, as is the ability to communicate professionally in English when we align on guidelines or feedback.

Deliverables I review at the end of each file:
• A clean, speaker-labeled French transcript with timestamps every 30 seconds  
• A separate annotation layer containing any non-verbal cues or notable audio events  
• A quick QA report that flags uncertainties or sections needing clarification

If you thrive on detail, can keep a steady weekly rhythm, and want to contribute to training next-generation AI, I would love to see a short sample of your previous French lecture or meeting transcriptions.

title: Poster Bisnis Sederhana
desc:
Saya mencari seorang desainer grafis yang bisa membantu saya membuat sebuah poster bisnis yang simpel namun tetap menarik. Karena ini proyek pertama saya, saya ingin prosesnya mudah dipahami dan hasil akhirnya jelas.

Kebutuhan utama:
• Poster cetak/digital bertema bisnis—ukuran boleh A3 atau setara.  
• Tampilan bersih, profesional, dan langsung menonjolkan pesan utama.  
• Warna serta tipografi selaras dengan nuansa korporat; saya terbuka pada saran palet selama tetap terlihat rapi.  
• File akhir dalam format edit-able (AI atau PSD) plus versi PDF siap cetak.

Harapan pengerjaan:
• Konsep awal cepat—sketsa atau draft sederhana untuk saya setujui.  
• Revisi ringan sampai poster terasa pas.  
• Estimasi penyelesaian sekitar tiga hari sejak proyek dimulai.

Jika Anda nyaman membuat poster bisnis dengan pendekatan sederhana, saya menantikan portofolio singkat Anda dan ide singkat tentang gaya yang akan Anda usung.

title: Realistic Large-Scale Watercolor Painting
desc:
I'm looking for an artist to create a large (over 24x36 inches) realistic watercolor painting from a photo I provide. No AI.

Ideal skills and experience:
- Expertise in realistic watercolor techniques
- Experience with large-scale paintings
- Ability to capture fine details and nuances from a photo
- A strong portfolio showcasing similar work

Please share samples of your previous work, especially in the realistic style and using watercolor.

title: Crypto Outreach and Marketing Campaign Execution
desc:
Crypto Project Outreach — Directory Submissions, Blog Outreach & KOL DMs (Solana)

Looking for someone to execute a fully documented outreach campaign for a Solana trading app (verixiaapps.com). Everything is prepared — submission URLs, form fields, outreach templates, KOL target lists, follow-up templates. You just execute.

Three parts:

1. Submit the project to 5 free crypto directories (DappRadar, Alchemy, RootData, Made on Sol, SolanaEcosystem.com). Exact URLs and instructions provided.

2. Email authors of 8+ roundup articles ranking for "best Solana DEX" to request inclusion. Templates provided. Also find additional articles via Google.

3. DM 20+ crypto KOLs on X/Twitter with a referral partnership offer (50% lifetime fee share, paid on-chain). Target list and templates provided. Must use your own X account.

You handle all follow-ups. Full PDF brief shared after hiring.

Deliverable: Spreadsheet with clickable proof URLs for every submission, email, and DM.

Budget: $100 USD flat.

To apply: Describe any outreach, crypto marketing, or link building work you've done. Bonus if you have an active crypto X/Twitter account.

title: South African Residential Working Drawings -- 2
desc:
I regularly design new-build homes around South Africa and need an experienced draughtsperson to turn my concept sketches and 3D models into a full set of architectural working drawings ready for council submission and on-site construction.

Scope  
– Translate supplied sketches, bubble diagrams or Revit/SketchUp models into detailed plans, elevations, sections, roof layouts and site plans.  
– Incorporate local code requirements (SANS 10400, municipal bylaws) and typical South African building methods.  
– Produce clear door & window schedules, dimensioned details and notes so builders can proceed without ambiguity.  
– Deliver both editable CAD (DWG/Revit) and print-ready PDF sheets.

Expect a collaborative process: I’ll mark up revisions; you update promptly until the pack is compliant and signed off. Accuracy, consistency in line weight and layer naming, and a good eye for residential design aesthetics are essential.

title: Instagram Hackathon Vlog Reel
desc:
Edit a first-person hackathon vlog reel for Instagram (fast-paced, story-driven)

I recently took part in a hackathon and filmed the entire experience. 
I'm looking for a skilled short-form editor to turn my raw footage into one punchy Instagram Reel (9:16) that tells the story of the event, from arrival to final pitch.

I have two sources of footage:
- First-person POV clips shot by me throughout the event (building, team moments, late-night coding, demos)
- A full external footage dump from someone who recorded the venue, crowd, our team, and general b-roll

- Total raw footage is roughly [10 minutes / 1 GB], shared via Google Drive.

Style reference - please watch before applying:
https://www.instagram.com/p/C9qHcznq9zE/
https://www.instagram.com/p/CtzATrwroNj/
https://www.instagram.com/p/DY7iZqoJLJE/

This is the exact style, pacing, and energy I want. In your proposal, tell me in a line or two what you notice about these edits so I know you actually watched them.

Requirements:
Proven experience with short-form vertical content (please link 2–3 similar reels)

title: Social Media Scriptwriting
desc:
I’m looking for a creative scriptwriter who can craft short, informative, and educational social-media copy that sparks real engagement. The focus is purely on driving conversation and interaction—no hard selling—so every line should invite comments, shares, and saves across Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.

Here’s what I need from you:
• Concise, scroll-stopping hooks followed by clear, value-packed explanations or tips  
• Captions formatted for each platform’s best practices (character limits, hashtags, line breaks)  
• A tone that balances authority with approachability, avoiding jargon while still teaching something useful  
• Suggestions for accompanying visuals or call-to-action prompts when relevant

Deliverables will be a batch of post scripts in a shared doc or .txt file, clearly labeled by platform. I’ll review, request tweaks if needed, and sign off once each script reads naturally and meets the engagement goal.

If you’ve written educational content that performed well on social, I’d love to see a sample or quick rundown of the results. Let’s make feeds smarter—and livelier—together.

title: Cartoonish Awareness Video Series
desc:
I run a public-awareness initiative and need a reliable 2D animator to bring my messages to life in a light, cartoonish style. Every month I’ll deliver polished scripts for:

• 8 short videos (≈60 seconds each), two released per week  
• 2 longer pieces (3–5 minutes each)

Your job is to take the script, translate it into a brief storyboard if needed, design engaging characters and backgrounds, then animate, add basic sound effects or royalty-free music, and hand back final MP4s ready for social platforms.

I’m happy with any workflow you prefer—Toon Boom Harmony, Adobe Animate, After Effects, TVPaint—so long as the finished product is crisp, colourful and on schedule. All rights will transfer to me once the invoice is cleared; payment is released monthly when that package of ten videos is approved.

Deliverables each month  
1. Eight 1080p (or higher) shorts, ≤60 s  
2. Two 1080p (or higher) long videos, 3–5 min  
3. Source files (so I can re-edit text if laws change)  
4. One revision round per video

If you thrive on consistent work, can match a friendly cartoon look, and keep to weekly milestones, let’s talk and start animating.
